title: Moroccan Lentil Tagine
description: A hearty, comforting stew originating from Morocco, perfect for a cold evening. The combination of lentils, vegetables, and aromatic spices creates a rich and flavorful dish.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add carrot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add lentils, broth, water, tagine spice, cumin, coriander, and salt.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Stir occasionally and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
